_title: NR4A3 ensemble-robust redesign — machine-readable provenance + decision ledger
_rule: Every reported redesign result gets a `generation` label and a provenance row here. Do NOT silently mix `legacy` and repaired results in one comparison. Append-only for decisions; edit result rows only to add outputs/versions.

freeze.note: Baseline snapshot before the corrected pocket tracker / dense-lambda / new receptor panels change any comparison. denovo_401's legacy structures, poses, receptor frames and ABFE inputs are preserved in S3 and referenced below; they are NOT to be overwritten.
freeze.environment_note: GPU/alchemical env versions live in the per-job SageMaker containers (requirements pinned in sagemaker_src/ + boltz_src/); fpocket pinned to 4.0 for the harmonized audit. Per-run software versions are recorded on each result row as they are produced.

generations.legacy: Pre-redesign results (AF2 release-frame nomination, single-frame MM-GBSA/ABFE, pre-harmonized pocket definition). Kept as benchmark/control; never deleted.
generations.harmonized_tracking: Results under the score-INDEPENDENT orthosteric-pocket definition (pocket_tracking.py; fixed Pocket-5 lining set; Jaccard/recovery+centroid gate; pinned fpocket 4.0).
generations.dense_lambda: Results under the repaired dense-16-window ABFE schedule (soft-core-tail overlap restored). FEP-class; gated (GATE-2).
generations.ensemble_redesign: New candidates + scoring on the prespecified conformer panel (design/validation/stress), ranked by worst-case S.

results.frame: release-derived design frame (Rg~0.667 primary; 0.74 seed) — EXACT frame id to be pinned by Gate A
results.software_version: openmmtools alchemy ABFE (legacy schedule); MM-GBSA GBn2
results.notes: Headline legacy selectivity: dG_bind ~ +3.5 (NR4A3) / +8.3 (NR4A1) / +8.5 (NR4A2); margin ~5 kcal/mol. BENCHMARK — do not delete.

results.receptor_structure: NR4A3 LBD, 8XTT-seeded (experimental NMR druggable model, MD-relaxed)
results.source_pdb_or_model: PDB 8XTT (20-model solution-NMR ensemble; a druggable model)
results.software_version: openmmtools alchemy ABFE (legacy schedule, low soft-core-tail overlap 0.017-0.026)
results.notes: dG_bind(NR4A3) = +8.17 +/- 0.98 — ~4.7 kcal/mol weaker than AF2-opened, > the whole selectivity margin. PRELIMINARY indication of conformer sensitivity (low lambda overlap; not yet dense-lambda-repaired). Provenance-MISMATCHED vs AF2 paralogue refs — not a fair selectivity comparison.

results.receptor_structure: all load-bearing NR4A3 ensembles (AF2 static, calibration, 8XTT 20 models, metad, 3 release reps)
results.pocket_tracking_impl: harmonized (pocket_tracking.py; fixed Pocket-5 lining set; jaccard_min 0.25 / frac_recovered 0.3 / centroid 8.0 A)
results.simulation_protocol: fpocket cavity detection + composite matcher; both-denominator detection
results.notes: GATE-1 CLEARED. Canonical site detected 95-100% across all ensembles (score-independent). Druggable (>=D*=0.53): 8XTT 3/20 (0.15); metad 0.68; release pooled 0.59; AF2-static 0/1. Exact-generation-frame row (Gate A) NOT yet in this audit — pending.

controls.note: current best; must be BEATEN on the matched panel (worst-case S and margin).
neutral form selective; cation (pH 7.4) REVERSES -> use to probe protonation fragility.

decision_ledger.item: provenance freeze + generation labels + this ledger

decision_ledger.decision: canonical site confirmed (95-100% detection); druggability low-population experimental (3/20 8XTT). GATE-1 cleared.

decision_ledger.item: EXACT denovo_401 generation-frame dependency audit (does the exact frame match the site, exceed D*, contain the claimed pocket-facing handles?)
decision_ledger.decision: PENDING — deliverable #3; must run the harmonized matcher on the exact generation frame specifically (not just pooled release).

decision_ledger.item: dense-lambda ABFE validation (NR4A2 repair pilot; apply to both NR4A3 variants)
decision_ledger.decision: FEP-class -> HELD per 'short of a new FEP run' (GATE-2).

decision_ledger.item: T4L L99A-benzene protocol-matched benchmark (final production protocol)
TICA reaction-coordinate validation (bias handling, lag-time, held-out, bootstrap)
decision_ledger.decision: CPU analysis of existing biased trajectories — ELIGIBLE now (non-FEP). Note: Phase-2 shakeout already returned NO-GO (0 recrossing, CV too Rg-like) -> coordinate needs redesign; do not launch phase-2 fleet.

decision_ledger.item: denovo_401 conformer-sensitivity mechanism report (dock/contacts/RMSD/HB/BSA/strain across panel)
decision_ledger.decision: CPU/spot, non-FEP — ELIGIBLE after the panel receptor set is built (Phase 2).

decision_ledger.item: freeze the prespecified receptor-conformer panel (design/validation/stress + matched NR4A1/NR4A2 anti-targets; brief §10.3 / deliverable #40)
decision_ledger.decision: DONE (rules-level freeze) -> nr4a3-conformer-panel.json. Frozen as DETERMINISTIC selection rules over the harmonized per-frame druggability (D*=0.53), not hand-picked indices, so it is reproducible AND cannot be gamed by shuffling failed conformers into design. design=top-3 unbiased-release druggable (not the AF2 frame); validation=3 druggable 8XTT NMR models + held-out release frames; stress=occluded 8XTT + AF2 + metad-opened; anti-targets=metad-opened NR4A1(524)/NR4A2(125) + opening-MD frames. Consumes a panel-docking run (cheap GPU/CPU <$10) -> ensemble_robust_score. Exact frame indices resolve from S3 at build time.

decision_ledger.item: extend ensemble_robust_score to S = min_c M_c - lambda*sigma - gamma*C - eta*L (add counterexample C + liability L terms, sign-reversal counts)
decision_ledger.decision: DONE — added S_ext = S - gamma_c*C - eta*L (kept SEPARATE from the energetic S so S stays pure energy), counterexample_report() (strong counterexamples vs any sign-reversal), and rank by S_ext with per-candidate liabilities. 29/29 unit tests pass (24 original unchanged + 5 new).

decision_ledger.item: Gate-2 published-chemistry docking benchmark (master brief §11): dock the registry's verified panel into state-matched opened NR4A3/1/2 pockets; test reproduction of known paralogue preferences (THPN/TMPA -> NR4A1; amodiaquine/chloroquine -> NR4A2; C-DIM12 non-binder control)
decision_ledger.decision: DONE (gpu-matrix run 29151841834, nr4a3-chem-benchmark, ~27 min, ~$1-2). VERDICT = chemically ACCOMMODATED but NOT DISCRIMINATING ('inconclusive', brief 11.3): the pocket fits all published NR4A actives (dG -5..-9), but docking-tier scoring reproduces only THPN's known NR4A1 preference cleanly; the other 3 discriminators are within docking noise (|mΔ|<=0.8), and the one strong 'NR4A3-selective' signal (celastrol +1.25) is the reactive-triterpenoid artifact. Reinforces: docking is a triage prior, selectivity must come from MM-GBSA/FEP/ternary (not single-pose docking). Also FIXED a conda/boost infra bug (smina vs rdkit libboost) that had broken the matrix pipeline for ALL runs. Full result table in published-warhead-registry.md (Gate-2 section).

decision_ledger.item: TRACK A — repaired ABFE validation ($40-80 AUTHORIZED, trimcrae+gate-AI). Single-leg-first pilot: resume NR4A2 dense-16-window replicate r1 to the soft-core-tail windows, then check adjacent overlap before r2/r3.
decision_ledger.decision: IN PROGRESS. Fixed a diagnostics bug first (detect_K: the validate gate crashed because it assumed 12 windows but the dense repair has 16). Diagnostics now run: r1 had only windows 0-5 (paused ~36%), early-window overlap healthy 0.17-0.26 but the TAIL (9-15, where the defect is) not yet reached. Resumed r1 complex-nr4a2 leg (spot, ~$12, job nr4a3-abfe-nr4a2rep-r1-complex-nr4a2-2026-07-11-14-09). ON r1 tail overlap: >~0.03 -> dense schedule fixed it -> resume r2/r3 for error bars; <0.03 -> ABORT (dense repair insufficient, ABFE can't be the primary selectivity tier).

decision_ledger.item: TRACK B — retrospective NR-V04 3-paralogue ternary benchmark (gate-AI: the higher-value method contribution). Blinded ensemble ternary workflow vs NR-V04 (KNOWN: degrades NR4A1, spares NR4A2/NR4A3) as the family-matched positive control.
decision_ledger.decision: SPEC + structure DONE. Representative NR-V04 built + RDKit-validated (celastrol C28-COOH + 4-PEG + VH032, two amides; C62H87N5O11S, MW 1110.5, InChIKey ADEXNWCZOWYLJV; flagged representative, NOT the ChEMBL CRBN collision). Full spec (systems, VHL+EloB/C, controls, ensemble readouts, single-leg-first pilot = VHL+VH032 control + NR4A1 first, verdict gate) in nrv04-ternary-benchmark.json. NEXT: build the VHL ternary harness (extend nr4a3_ternary.py CRBN->VHL + N-seed ensembles) and run the pilot.

decision_ledger.item: Gate-2 at the MM-GBSA tier: does multi-snapshot MM-GBSA reproduce known paralogue preferences where docking couldn't? (mmgbsa run 29152852051 on the 4 reversible discriminators)
decision_ledger.decision: NEGATIVE — MM-GBSA does NOT rescue discrimination and produces FALSE NR4A3-selective calls: the neutral NR4A1 ligands THPN/TMPA score NR4A3-tightest (labelled 'rescued'/selective — false positive, consistent with the opened-NR4A3-frame accommodation confound); the charged 4-aminoquinolines show protonation-fragile ~10-20 kcal electrostatic artifacts favouring NR4A1 (the denovo_111 failure mode). COMBINED Gate-2 (docking+MM-GBSA): neither cheap tier reproduces KNOWN NR4A paralogue preferences on real chemistry -> a strong external negative control on the in-silico selectivity stack; paralogue selectivity must come from FEP with resolved microstates + ensemble controls, or be hedged. Caveats: n=4, single opened frame, cations unresolved.

decision_ledger.item: published_warhead_registry (master-brief Workstream B / deliverables 30-33): machine-readable catalog of published NR4A chemistry — Zaienne NOR-1 series, NR4A1/Nur77 + NR4A2/Nurr1 anti-target panels, NR-V04 reference degrader + celastrol warhead + VHL/CRBN E3 handles
decision_ledger.decision: BUILT — builder (published_warhead_registry.py) resolves + cross-checks structures across ChEMBL/PubChem/CACTUS (InChIKey-skeleton agreement -> high/medium/unresolved), RDKit-profiles each (QED/SA/PAINS/BRENK/PROTAC handles), flags covalent/reactive warheads (celastrol/DHI/PGA1) for special handling, and records paywalled/novel matter (Zaienne members) HONESTLY as unresolved (never invented). 13 pure-logic tests pass. Runs on the warhead-chem-profile CPU runner (dispatched with ref=<branch>); output published to modalities-cache.

decision_ledger.item: Job-progress monitoring (trimcrae request: 'catch if it hangs and get ETAs as we go') + Track B NR-V04/VHL ternary pilot
decision_ledger.decision: BUILT monitoring: job_progress_monitor.py parses ABFE/Boltz CloudWatch log tails -> newest progress marker + real event time -> min/unit + ETA + hang verdict (Eastern 12h); tail_cloudwatch.py now prepends each event's REAL CloudWatch timestamp (GitHub was collapsing all lines to the tail-run instant, defeating ETA/hang). Kind-aware hang thresholds: Boltz per-seed markers (~3.5 min) reliable at 25 min; ABFE lambda-windows run 30-100 min on the OpenCL fallback so window-start markers are NOT a hang signal -- authoritative ABFE progress is per-window jsonl checkpoint DEPTH via abfe-progress-aws.yml. RAN Track B NR-V04 pilot (control+NR4A1, 3 seeds): NR4A1 (known-degraded) STRONGLY recovered -- NR-V04 bridges NR4A1 & VHL in 3/3 seeds (lig->target 2.4-3.3 A, lig->VHL 2.3-2.6 A), ligand-iPTM 0.857 (0.82-0.91), exposed Lys53 3.3 A from VHL (ubiquitin-reach proxy). Control initially MISSING (control:null) -- VH032 does not resolve by ChEMBL pref_name so the control YAML was silently skipped; FIXED resolve_vh032_smiles (env->ChEMBL->PubChem->spec) + --control-only cheap re-run (in flight).
decision_ledger.status: tooling done + merged; Track B pilot NR4A1 leg favourable; control backfill in progress; NR4A2/NR4A3 fan-out gated on control seating (single-leg-first)
decision_ledger.outputs: research/modalities/job_progress_monitor.py (+12 tests); research/modalities/report_nrv04.py (+10 tests); .github/workflows/report-nrv04-aws.yml; research/modalities/report_nrv04.json (auto, S3 nrv04-ternary-pilot); tail_cloudwatch.py real-timestamp fix; abfe_progress_nr4a2rep_r1.png (modalities-cache)

decision_ledger.item: Track B RESULT: retrospective NR-V04 3-paralogue ternary benchmark (NR4A1 degraded vs NR4A2/NR4A3 spared) — the family-matched positive control for a paralogue-discriminating ternary workflow
decision_ledger.decision: RAN full 3-paralogue benchmark (control VH032 + NR4A1/NR4A2/NR4A3 x 3 seeds, VHL+EloB/C, NR-V04). RESULT = INFORMATIVE: the workflow recovers the known NR-V04 selectivity via PRODUCTIVE-TERNARY GEOMETRY. NR4A1 (degraded) bridges NR-V04 to both target(2.4-3.3A) and VHL(2.3-2.6A) in 3/3 seeds; NR4A2/NR4A3 (spared) seat the warhead in VHL(2.0-2.6A) but leave the target LBD 6-26A away -> 0/3 productive ternaries. Exposed-Lys->VHL reach also orders correctly (NR4A1 5.5 < NR4A2 7.1 < NR4A3 9.1 A). KEY METHOD FINDING: ligand-iPTM INVERTS (spared NR4A2 highest, 0.910 vs NR4A1 0.857) because it scores the confidently-placed VHL-warhead half regardless of ternary formation -> confidence scores are NOT a valid ternary-selectivity metric; productive-geometry readouts are. full_verdict rewritten to a transparent composite (geometry primary, ligand-iPTM reported+flagged).
decision_ledger.status: done — verdict INFORMATIVE on pre-specified productive-geometry + Lys readouts; retrospective n=1 (NR-V04 only), and NR4A1-selectivity != NR4A3-selectivity, so this LICENSES comparative prospective use of the ternary workflow for NR4A3 designs, it does not validate any specific NR4A3 prediction
decision_ledger.outputs: research/modalities/report_nrv04.json (full 3-paralogue, S3 nrv04-ternary-pilot); nrv04-ternary-benchmark.json .result; report_nrv04.py composite full_verdict (+11 tests); control_ligand VH032 (InChIKey JAHUHEDUDMTTTF-COWZOJLOSA-N)
